title: AN ACT CONSTITUTING PORTIONS OF BARRIOS DAGUPAN, VILLA MAGAT AND SAN MANUEL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MATEO, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO LIGAYA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3110 / 57 OG No. 7, 1190 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2791, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CONSTITUTING PORTIONS OF BARRIOS DAGUPAN, VILLA MAGAT AND SAN MANUEL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MATEO, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO LIGAYA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Portions of barrios Dagupan, Villa Magat and San Manuel in the Municipality of San Mateo, Province of Isabela, separated from said barrios by the canal of the Magat River Irrigation System, are constituted into a barrio to be known as Barrio Ligaya.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
